title: Frontend WebSocket Frame
description: Any inbound frame on the platform→SPA WebSocket fan-out: exactly one of the four frame types, discriminated by `type`. A consumer validates each received frame against this schema and dispatches on `type`; unknown `type` values are ignored client-side (forward-compatible, frontend data model §5). The four branches are mutually exclusive because each fixes a distinct `type` const, so oneOf matches exactly one.
